finding_results.notes: Added command-gated execution beat with signed authorization and named transmission actor (Kincaid) sending milestone-one materials through PIO portal and mirrored evidence channel before 8:00 p.m.
Inserted Teresa's hallway-window visual identification, multiple concrete bodily grief reactions, and immediate crowd/deputy fallout before the scene break.
Interleaved immediate reactions after each milestone declaration and replaced abstract legal summary with a concrete stamped motion, docket identifier, signature line, and exhibit artifact.
Chapter ending now includes explicit June status (vehicle recovered, June missing) plus named search owner (Tolliver) and concrete reporting deadlines.
Replaced formulaic 'landed like' construction with concrete physical action tied to Clay's coercive posture.

summary: Revised chapter 8 resolves all packet findings by restoring the omitted Teresa visual-identification consequence sequence, increasing embodied causality across the milestone confrontation, replacing formulaic prose, executing the 8:00 deadline on-page under command controls, and closing with explicit June-status ownership and timing.
